creator: yanhui.he@broadcom.com
text:
Thanks Dave for your quick response!

Using the latest RC1 ISO image for amd64 released on Nov 23, 2024, and it could be installed now.
https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/14.2/FreeBSD-14.2-RC1-amd64-dvd1.iso

I didn't check the difference between Beta3 and RC1 for FreeBSD 14.2 amd64 ISO.

Anyway, this PR has been closed by using the newer version.

I'll close it.
